# Apollo 11 LM Luminary 099 Provenance

- Mission/software family: Apollo 11 LM / Luminary 099
- Intended source reference:
  - Apollo-11 repository `Luminary099`
  - Virtual AGC source listings and associated binaries
- Repo use today:
  - `app/src/main/assets/programs/apollo11/lm/luminary099/rope_excerpt.cfg`
    - Apollo-derived rope-word excerpt, read-only program data
  - `app/src/main/assets/programs/apollo11/lm/luminary099/erasable_init.cfg`
    - custom erasable initializer, not Apollo code
  - `app/src/main/assets/bootstrap/apollo11/lm/luminary099/bootstrap.cfg`
    - custom bootstrap/scenario data, not Apollo code
- Runtime status:
  - not yet original Apollo software execution
  - currently used by an emulator-oriented native core plus a temporary compatibility layer
